dialogue1.phrase: All tasks finished? Looks like we've reached the end of the quarter!

dialogue2.phrase: And you know what that means? Accumulated documentation? Endless meetings? Professional existential crisis?

dialogue5.phrase: At the end of each quarter, you will take an assessment based on the content learned during projects and study sessions.

dialogue6.phrase: So… yes. Paying attention to the tutorial really was important.

dialogue7.phrase: But relax! There's no danger in failing here.

dialogue8.phrase: If you do well, your superiors will be impressed with your skills. And that means financial bonuses for RetroCODE!

dialogue9.phrase: More money… more possibilities to hire better developers.

dialogue10.phrase: Oh, an important detail: you can only take the qualification when all ongoing contracts are finished.

dialogue11.phrase: To see their progress, just click the icon at the top of the main screen.

dialogue12.phrase: That's also where you receive the amount paid by the client.

dialogue13.phrase: While contracts haven't finished, you can take the opportunity to review the content saved in the Notebook. It's never too late to study!
